project.name: namuh-eng/*
project.description:
We maintain multiple open-source developer infrastructure projects under the namuh-eng GitHub organization.

Our projects include:
- OpenGithub (open-source GitHub alternative)
- OpenSend (open-source Resend alternative)
- Exponential (open-source Linear alternative)
- OpenDocs (open-source Mintlify alternative)
- Ralph-to-Ralph, an autonomous SaaS cloning and deployment pipeline

These projects are built using Rust, Next.js, TypeScript, cloud-native infrastructure, and autonomous AI workflows.

We would like to use 1Password Teams to securely manage deployment secrets, cloud credentials, OAuth environments, CI/CD workflows, and contributor access across our OSS infrastructure.
